defs: to make a lot of noise

pinyin: you4 hao3 qi4 you4 hao3 xiao4
defs: annoyed and amused in equal measure

trad: 又想當婊子又想立牌坊
simp: 又想当婊子又想立牌坊
pinyin: you4 xiang3 dang1 biao3 zi5 you4 xiang3 li4 pai2 fang1
defs: lit. to lead the life of a whore but still want a monument put up to one's chastity (idiom)
fig. to have bad intentions but still want a good reputation
to want to have one's cake and eat it too

trad: 又要馬兒好，又要馬兒不吃草
simp: 又要马儿好，又要马儿不吃草
pinyin: you4 yao4 ma3 r5 hao3 , you4 yao4 ma3 r5 bu4 chi1 cao3
defs: see 又要馬兒跑，又要馬兒不吃草|又要马儿跑，又要马儿不吃草[you4 yao4 ma3 r5 pao3 , you4 yao4 ma3 r5 bu4 chi1 cao3]

trad: 又要馬兒跑，又要馬兒不吃草
simp: 又要马儿跑，又要马儿不吃草
pinyin: you4 yao4 ma3 r5 pao3 , you4 yao4 ma3 r5 bu4 chi1 cao3
defs: lit. you can't expect the horse to run fast but not let it graze (idiom)
fig. you can't have your cake and eat it, too
